title: Narrow gap HgCdTe absorption behavior near the band edge including nonparabolicity and the Urbach tail
notes: Author-posted primary full text. Experimental absorption curve for Hg0.79Cd0.21Te near 80 K; n-type material with carrier concentration in the low 1e15 cm-3 range and characterized defects. Composition growth/metrology provenance is deferred to earlier work, and no point uncertainty or machine-readable spectrum is recovered.

title: Detailed Study of Above Bandgap Optical Absorption in HgCdTe
notes: Author-posted primary full text. Twelve MBE samples on CdZnTe, x=0.22-0.60, FTIR at 40-300 K, and room-temperature ellipsometry on four samples. FTIR and ellipsometry agree near absorption turn-on, but growth/composition details are deferred to earlier work and the final model explicitly uses Hansen Eg.

title: Optical absorption studies of HgCdTe epitaxial layers for improved infrared detector modeling
notes: Primary abstract reports MBE layers with automated compositional control from spectroscopic ellipsometry, varying composition, thickness, and temperature. Full text and point-level spectra were not recovered.

title: The determination of the x value in doped Hg1-xCdxTe by transmission spectra
notes: Primary abstract reports variable-temperature transmission on As-doped MBE HgCdTe and warns that transmission-derived x depends on the reference temperature because shallow levels shift the edge. Full point data and independent composition metrology were not recovered.

title: Optical characterization of defects in narrow-gap HgCdTe for infrared detector applications
notes: Open full review with absorption and PL data for bulk, LPE, and MBE material near x=0.3. It is strong mechanism evidence for defect-, Fermi-level-, conductivity-, and temperature-dependent observation shifts, but not an independent universal x-Eg-T fit dataset.
